creator: yamayan@wind.sannet.ne.jp
text:
unzip(1) option -p NOT quiet!

> unzip -p ANY.zip
Archive:  ANY.zip
[unzipped ANY.zip]

First line MUST NOT output.

Fix: 

/usr/src/usr.bin/unzip/unzip.c
line 817: printf("Archive:  %s\n", fn);
add if-expression, ex. if(!p_opt)
How-To-Repeat: > echo FreeBSD > ANY.txt
> zip ANY.zip ANY.txt
> unzip -p ANY.zip
Archive:  ANY.zip
FreeBSD
